purpose: Describe the CMS fields the QA runner needs before Sanity-aware freshness and agent-readable mirrors can become active checks.

requiredFieldGroups.name: identity
requiredFieldGroups.description: Stable identity for mapping CMS records to visible site routes and dashboard findings.

requiredFieldGroups.name: route
requiredFieldGroups.description: Canonical slug or explicit route used to compare CMS state with crawled pages.

requiredFieldGroups.name: title
requiredFieldGroups.description: Human-readable title used in reports, Markdown mirrors, and JSON-LD.

requiredFieldGroups.name: freshnessDates
requiredFieldGroups.description: Dates needed to decide whether lab/event/application copy is current.

requiredFieldGroups.name: publicState
requiredFieldGroups.description: Editorial state that should agree with visible CTA copy.

requiredFieldGroups.name: cta
requiredFieldGroups.description: CTA label and target used to catch stale forms, past events, and wrong workflow destinations.

requiredFieldGroups.name: agentReadableBody
requiredFieldGroups.description: Canonical text source for Markdown mirrors and llms.txt entries.

notes: Use the published Sanity perspective for production parity.
Use the drafts perspective only for staging/editorial preview checks, with useCdn=false and a read token.
Generate HTML, Markdown mirrors, JSON-LD, sitemap, and llms.txt from the same canonical CMS record instead of maintaining separate copies.
